title: TISS Notification 2026 - Apply Online for 02 Assistant Professor Posts
description: Tata Institute of Social Sciences (TISS) has declared the latest job notification for 2026. To fill up the various vacancies for 02 Assistant Professor Jobs. Those candidates who have qualified in the Post Graduationcan grab this chance and apply for the TISS Notification 2026 . Here, we included more details about the age limit, selection process, salary structure, education details, application fee, and how to apply for these posts.
